candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; matches typical REVT definition and has full data across years.
Explicit total revenue line with identical values to 'Revenue'; included as secondary in case label changes over time.
Other operating income item, not total revenue; excluded for REVT.
Investment income, not operating revenue; excluded for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Gross rental income from operating leases on investment properties
candidates.why: Component of other income, not overall company revenue; excluded for REVT.
Finance income, not operating revenue; excluded for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income (loss) for the period / year attributable to shareholders of the Company
candidates.why: Represents bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue; excluded for REVT.

variables.notes: Both 'Revenue' and 'Total Revenue' represent the same top-line figure; 'Revenue' is used as primary with 'Total Revenue' as a backup label for other periods.

candidates.why: Direct shipping-related operating costs consistent with cost of sales for a shipping company; best match for COGS.
More like SG&A/overhead rather than direct cost of sales; not chosen for COGS.
Net operating result including multiple components, not a pure cost-of-sales line; excluded.
Non-operating; not COGS.
Could be overhead or occupancy cost, not clearly direct cost of sales here; excluded for COGS.

variables.notes: Shipping Related Expenses represents the direct costs associated with generating revenue in a shipping business and is the most appropriate COGS proxy.

candidates.why: Represents other operating INCOME (often negative expenses), not SG&A expense; excluded from XSGA components.
Also operating income, not expense; excluded from SG&A.
Typical SG&A-style overhead bucket of miscellaneous operating expenses; included as an SG&A component.
Classic SG&A component (personnel/compensation cost) and should be included if present.
Equity reserve, not a period expense; excluded from SG&A expense components.

variables.notes: Selected SG&A-related expense components only: 'Other operating expenses' (overhead bucket) and 'Share-Based Compensation'. Operating income lines and equity reserves are excluded by definition.
No line item related to research and development appears in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews; XRD is treated as absent (0).

candidates.why: Primary line for interest expense; best first-choice mapping for XINT.
Represents capitalized interest, not period expense; excluded as primary XINT measure.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific interest expense on lease liabilities; included as secondary choice in case the main Interest Expense line is missing for some periods.
Finance income, opposite sign of interest expense; not chosen for XINT.
Balance sheet equity total, not an interest expense item; excluded.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Mapped XINT to the main 'Interest Expense' line, with lease-related interest as a secondary backup label. Capitalized interest and interest income are excluded by definition.

candidates.why: Represents total shareholders' equity; separate line from 'Total Equity & Minority Interest', indicating it excludes minority interests.
Includes both equity and any minority interest; using this for BE would risk double-counting MIB.
Represents total balance sheet size, not equity alone; excluded for BE.

variables.notes: 'Total Equity' is used as book equity attributable to shareholders; a separate 'Total Equity & Minority Interest' line exists, so BE is mapped to the equity-only line.

candidates.why: Represents combined equity and minority interest; no separate minority interest component line is provided.

variables.notes: There is no separate line for minority/non-controlling interests; 'Total Equity & Minority Interest' aggregates equity and MIB and cannot be used directly without double-counting. Given that its values match 'Total Equity' in the preview years, minority interest appears to be zero, so MIB is set to [].
